title: ceratophyllum demersum var. inerme
intro: Ceratophyllum demersum var. inerme, also known as hornwort, is a type of floating aquatic plant that belongs to the family Ceratophyllaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of hornwort include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Hornwort can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in some traditional folk remedies.
